items.title: Protesters wrap 'crime scene' tape around White House perimeter | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>In a peaceful demonstration, protesters demanding President Donald Trump to step down marched in Washington, D.C., and wrapped crime scene tape around the White House perimeter. 
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #whitehouse #trump

items.title: Families demand justice in North Macedonia nightclub fire trial | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Families walked through Skopje in North Macedonia, carrying photos of loved ones and calling for justice after a nightclub fire in March left dozens dead and hundreds injured. The trial for suspects is set to begin next week. 
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #northmacedonia #club #fire #tragedy

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Tariffs, the Louvre and the Russia-Ukraine war
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Trump cuts tariffs on coffee, beef, and hundreds of other grocery staples. The U.S. president threatens to sue the BBC for up to five billion dollars over an edited speech. Russia pounds Kyiv in one of its biggest attacks after Ukraine hits a Black Sea oil port. Plus, investigators chase stolen Louvre jewels through Antwerp's diamond underworld.



Listen to the latest episode of On Assignment "Trump vs the BBC (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/trump-vs-bbc-2025-11-15/) ".

items.title: Blast at police station in Indian Kashmir kills nine, injures 27 | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>At least nine people were killed and 27 injured, including policemen, government officials and forensic staff who were examining confiscated explosives at a police station in Indian Kashmir.

#india #indiakashmir #police #blast #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: Japan's 'muscle girls' challenge beauty norms and femininity
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>At an underground bar in a busy neighborhood of Tokyo, roughly a dozen women in sportswear stand behind a bar, their chiseled frames on full display as they dance and crush grapefruits with their bare hands. Muscle Girls, a fitness-themed bar staffed exclusively by women, has been a hit with foreign tourists and domestic patrons alike as it challenges Japan's conventional concept of feminine beauty.
 
#japan #muscle #girl #femininity #beauty</article>

items.title: How Trump's second term reshaped US climate policy | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Trump’s return to the White House has triggered a sweeping rollback of US climate policy, reversing many of the initiatives introduced under former President Biden and reshaping the country’s energy priorities. 

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #climatechange #donaldtrump

items.title: Switzerland wins US tariff rate cut, pledges investments | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The US and Switzerland announced a framework trade agreement that slashed US tariffs on Swiss imports to 15% from 39% and secured a pledge for $200 billion in Swiss investment in the US by 2028.
